title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can delete their account from Account Settings.

title: Change Email Address
content: Users can change their email address from Profile > Email under Account Settings.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Users can enable two-factor authentication from Settings > Security by linking an authenticator app or phone number.

title: Subscription Cancellation
content: Users can cancel their subscription anytime from Billing > Subscriptions and will retain access until the end of the billing period.
